'''zhagïffïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibroma|fibroma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibroma|fibroma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| zhagïffïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zhægïffïfth || zhægïffïfj || zhægïffïfsh || zhægïffïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zhagïfgïffïfth || zhagïfgïffïfj || zhagïfgïffïfsh || zhagïfgïffïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zhagïffïfth || zhagïffïfj || zhagïffïfsh || zhagïffïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zhagïfffïffth || zhagïfffïffj || zhagïfffïffsh || zhagïfffïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zhagïffïfïf || zhagïffïfïf || zhagïffïfïf || zhagïffïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || zhagïffïfth || zhagïffïfj || zhagïffïfsh || zhagïffïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zhagïffïfïfl || zhagïffïfïfl || zhagïffïfïfl || zhagïffïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zhagïffïfïfïf || zhagïffïfïfïf || zhagïffïfïfïf || zhagïffïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || zhagïffïfïfn || zhagïffïfïfn || zhagïffïfïfn || zhagïffïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zhagïffïfïforo || zhagïffïfïforo || zhagïffïfïforo || zhagïffïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
